zh.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale是Henry Ragsdale II和Ragsdale的兒子，於從1484年1月10日到1485年1月9日出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾聶頓。他於大約1500年與Ellen Snowden在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1559年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale是Henry Ragsdale II和Ragsdale的儿子，于从1484年1月10日到1485年1月9日出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾聶頓。他于大约1500年与Ellen Snowden在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1559年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Ragsdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name from Ragdale (Leicestershire). The placename appears to derive from Old English hraca ‘throat, gulley, narrow pass’ (genitive hracan) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. From the 16th century onward the more common form of the surname is Ragsdale with an intrusive -s-.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale was born from 10 January 1484 to 9 January 1485, in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry Ragsdale II and Ragsdale. He married Ellen Snowden about 1500, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1559, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale est né du 10 janvier 1484 au 9 janvier 1485, à Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry Ragsdale II et Ragsdale. Il a épousé Ellen Snowden environ 1500, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1559, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale wurde von 10. Januar 1484 bis 9. Januar 1485 in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Henry Ragsdale II und Ragsdale geboren. Er hat um 1500 in Nottinghamshire, England Ellen Snowden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1559 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale è nato il da 10 gennaio 1484 a 9 gennaio 1485 nel Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Henry Ragsdale II e Ragsdale. Lui sposato Ellen Snowden circa 1500, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1559, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdaleはから1484年1月10日まで1485年1月9日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアネエトンでHenry Ragsdale IIとRagsdaleの息子として生まれた。約1500年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでEllen Snowdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1559年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale(은)는 1484년 1월 10일부터 1485년 1월 9일까지 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 니턴에서 Henry Ragsdale II(와)과 Ragsdale의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Ellen Snowden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1559년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale nasceu de 10 de janeiro de 1484 a 9 de janeiro de 1485, em Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Henry Ragsdale II e Ragsdale. Ele casou-se com Ellen Snowden aproximadamente 1500, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1559, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale родился с 10 января 1484 по 9 января 1485 в местности нитон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Henry Ragsdale II и Ragsdale. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Snowden около 1500 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1559 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Ragsdale nació desde 10 de enero de 1484 hasta 9 de enero de 1485, en Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Henry Ragsdale II y Ragsdale. Se casó con Ellen Snowden aproximadamente 1500, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1559, en su pueblo.
